messages.content:
Which task cannot be performed by using DISM?
	a. Adding files to an image	
	b. Applying Windows updates to an offline image	
	c. Applying application updates to an offline image	
	d. Creating an image	
	e. Applying an image
c. Applying application updates to an offline image

Which utility is used to create answer files for unattended installations?
	a. DISM	
	b. Windows PE	
	c. Windows Configuration Designer	
	d. Sysprep	
	e. Windows SIM
e. Windows SIM

hich utility is used to prepare computers for imaging by removing specific information, such as the computer name and computer SID?
	a. DISM	
	b. Windows SIM	
	c. Windows Deployment Services	
	d. Windows PE	
	e. Sysprep
e. Sysprep

Which installation methods require booting into Windows PE before Windows 10 starts? (Choose all that apply.)
a. Removable media installation	
b. Upgrade installation	
c. Distribution share installation	
d. Windows AutoPilot	
e. Image-based installation

a. Removable media installation
c. Distribution share installation
e. Image-based installation

Which installation method can be used to distribute Windows 10 with applications already installed?
	a. Clean installation	
	b. Removable media installation	
	c. Image-based installation	
	d. Distribution share installation	
	e. Unattended installation
c. Image-based installation

hich methods can you use to migrate user settings from Windows 8.1 to Windows 10? (Choose all that apply.)
a. Copy the user profile from the old computer to the new computer.	
b. Use the User State Migration Tool.	
c. Use Windows Easy Transfer.	
d. Use Remote Desktop to copy to files.	
e. Perform an upgrade over the top of the old operating system.

b. Use the User State Migration Tool.
c. Use Windows Easy Transfer.

Which methods can you use to place applications from a previous operating system on Windows 10? (Choose all that apply.)
a. Use the User State Migration Tool.	
b. Use Windows Easy Transfer.	
c. Reinstall the applications on the new computer.	
d. Perform an upgrade over the top of the previous operating system.	
e. Copy the applications from the previous computer to the new computer.

c. Reinstall the applications on the new computer.
e. Copy the applications from the previous computer to the new computer.

Which utility can be used to update drivers in an existing Windows 10 image?
	a. Sysprep	
	b. Windows SIM	
	c. Windows Update	
	d. Windows Configuration Designer	
	e. DISM
e. DISM

Which configuration passes automatically search for an autounattend.xml file, if an answer file is not specified? (Choose all that apply.)
a. offlineServicing	
b. windowsPE	
c. generalize	
d. oobeSystem	
e. specialize

b. windowsPE
d. oobeSystem

Which configuration pass can be used to perform disk partitioning operations?
	a. windowsPE	
	b. oobeSystem	
	c. offlineServicing	
	d. generalize	
	e. specialize
a. windowsPE

Which configuration pass is performed only by Sysprep?
	a. windowsPE	
	b. generalize	
	c. specialize	
	d. offlineServicing	
	e. oobeSystem
b. generalize

Windows Configuration Designer can be used to completely automate the deployment of Windows 10. True or False?
 a. True	
 b. False
b. False

A WIM image file containing two Windows 10 images will be approximately twice as big as a WIM image file containing one Windows 10 image. True or False?
 a. True	
 b. False
b. False

Which of the following are scenarios where you could use provisioning? (Choose all that apply.)
a. Deploying new Microsoft Store apps	
b. Deploying Microsoft 365 Apps	
c. Updating Windows 10 Pro to Window 10 Enterprise	
d. Upgrading Windows 8.1 to Windows 10	
e. Performing a clean installation of Windows 10

a. Deploying new Microsoft Store apps
b. Deploying Microsoft 365 Apps

Which tool is used to create provisioning packages?
	a. Windows Configuration Designer	
	b. Windows PE	
	c. PCmover Express	
	d. Windows SIM	
	e. ACT
a. Windows Configuration Designer

Which two files are included in USMT to copy user profiles?
a. loadstate.exe	
b. dism.exe	
c. scanstate.exe	
d. setup.exe	
e. sysprep.exe

a. loadstate.exe
c. scanstate.exe

Which image type in WDS is used to start Windows PE and apply an image?
	a. AutoUnattend.xml	
	b. Capture image	
	c. Install image	
	d. Discover image	
	e. Boot image
e. Boot image

The zero-touch installation option in MDT requires the use of Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager. True or False?
 a. True	
 b. False
b. False

How many times can you use the generalize option in sysprep on a single image?
	a. 8	
	b. Unlimited	
	c. 5	
	d. 12	
	e. 3

The user-driven mode for Windows AutoPilot can join the computer to Azure AD or Active Directory. True or False?
 a. True	
 b. False
a. True
